ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "duration" REAL /* Total duration of the album in minutes */,
  "album_cover_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the album contains explicit content */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the album is a single track or a full album */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label associated with the album */,
  "album_description" TEXT /* Text description of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist or band */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year when the artist debuted */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label associated with the artist */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profile */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Text biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being tracked */,
  "streaming_count" INTEGER /* Number of streams for the album */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the album */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount in dollars for the album */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average user rating for the album */,
  "daily_streaming_count" INTEGER /* Number of streams per day */,
  "monthly_streaming_count" INTEGER /* Number of streams per month */,
  "weekly_download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads per week */,
  "monthly_download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads per month */,
  "daily_sales_amount" REAL /* Daily sales amount */,
  "monthly_sales_amount" REAL /* Monthly sales amount */,
  "total_listeners" INTEGER /* Total number of unique listeners */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A calculated score based on user interactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the genre icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, label, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the album (1-5 scale) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the label */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the label was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the label's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the label's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genre" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "primary_genre" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the genre is the primary genre for the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)
